title: Student Info Form Schema
description: Documents the exact structure of the main survey's student info section (the 16 columns before Q1 in Form Responses 2 / response_row). Source of truth for field order and exact dropdown option strings — update this file whenever the live Google Form changes, since route detection and other logic depend on exact string matches, not fuzzy keywords.
form_name: Bộ Test Hướng Nghiệp GenZ American Dream

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.note: Auto-added by Google Forms, not a real question

fields.label: Mã token
fields.note: Pre-filled via URL param, student instructed not to change it

fields.label: Bạn đang quan tâm hướng nào nhất?
options: Chọn ngành đại học ở VN
fields.used_by: report.py _detect_route() — exact match required, see ROUTE_BY_DIRECTION

fields.label: 3 hoạt động bạn thích làm nhất (ghi ngắn)
fields.note: Free text, not a dropdown — student writes 3 short activities

fields.label: Cam kết mini: Khi làm bài, bạn sẽ chọn theo đúng đời thật (không "diễn")

route_mapping._comment: Mirrors ROUTE_BY_DIRECTION in server/services/report.py — keep in sync if the form's dropdown options ever change.
